description: Canonical GHL campaign config for CONTAINED Adelaide 2026. P1 of thoughts/shared/plans/2026-06-08-contained-adelaide-campaign-crm.md, under the R4 ruling (CONTAINED conforms to the one-account canonical contract: project:act-jh + source:event:contained + interest:justice-reform + comms:justicehub-newsletter). RC1-RC4 LOCKED 2026-06-09: RC1 Professional->partner; RC2 keep engagement:/campaign-stage: lifecycle; RC3 strip legacy tag after canonical; RC4 GHL native calendar. RC5 LOCKED 2026-06-09 (Ben): UNIFIED source tag - one source:event:contained for every CONTAINED city; the stop is distinguished by place:<x> (Adelaide = place:sa), NOT a city-suffixed source. Matches JusticeHub shipped code (GHL_CANONICAL.SOURCE_EVENT_CONTAINED + PR #44). DATA ONLY. No code here applies anything; live GHL writes are Tier 3, day-shift, gated to the 16 Jun go/no-go. Source evidence cited in thoughts/shared/handoffs/general/2026-06-09_contained-cta-ghl-alignment.md.

meta._comment: RC5 (2026-06-09, Ben): ONE unified CONTAINED source tag (source:event:contained) for every city; the stop is distinguished by place:<x>, NOT a city-suffixed source. campaign_slug names the campaign for internal/reporting use only; it does NOT drive the source tag. Per-stop campaigns reuse this config and segment on source:event:contained + place:<x>.

canonical_contract._comment: Every CONTAINED contact gets these identity tags regardless of which form they arrived through. Identity tags NEVER trigger a send (5-layer model: DESCRIBE). Only comms:* enrols, and only with captured consent.

role_map._comment: JusticeHub register/signup role dropdown -> canonical role: namespace (8 canonical roles: funder/partner/buyer/supporter/storyteller/researcher/media/community). RC1 LOCKED 2026-06-09 (Professional->partner scheme): service_org/practitioner/policymaker->role:partner; advocate/artist/student->role:supporter.

lived_experience._comment: OCAP: never auto-enrolled into comms:*; automation suppressed even on a newsletter tick; explicit opt-in human-confirmed.

state_to_place._comment: Use STATE_TO_PLACE (place:<x>), NOT the legacy state:<x>. Mirrors JusticeHub src/lib/ghl/client.ts GHL_CANONICAL.

community_line.rule: Never auto-enrolled into any comms:* drip/newsletter; never an automation segment. comms:* sits on a community-line contact ONLY with explicit newsletter_consent=Yes evidence (their choice; storyteller/Elder opt-ins human-confirmed). NOT exclusion - operational + 1:1 + opt-in messages still reach them.
community_line._comment: OCAP agency model, forms-plan R3/R9. Canon: wiki/concepts/ghl-audience-comms-automation.md §5.

consent_gate.rule: No comms:justicehub-newsletter without newsletter_consent=Yes captured at the form (Spam Act 2003). Inquiry is not consent.

newsletter._comment: R4: the build spec's '6 CONTAINED streams' are NOT six new comms: tags. There is ONE enrolment tag (comms:justicehub-newsletter, consent-gated). The streams become smart-list SEGMENTS keyed on canonical tags. A send targets a segment, not a tag.

daily-recap._comment: place:sa pins this to the Adelaide stop under the unified-source model (RC5)

future-cities._comment: RC5 unified source: future cities are source:event:contained contacts whose place: is NOT the current stop (sa). Build the per-city segment as source:event:contained + place:<city> when that stop is scoped.

calendar._comment: Self-serve booking (Ben, 2026-06-09) - the precondition that un-defers the pipeline (campaign-CRM plan D1). Live creation = Tier 3, gated to go/no-go. RC4 LOCKED 2026-06-09: GHL native Calendar, not an embedded form.
calendar.name: CONTAINED Adelaide Walkthroughs
calendar.ocap: Never auto-drip a lane:community booker; re-offer no-shows by human follow-up.

pipeline._comment: Now SCOPED (was deferred D1) because the self-serve calendar exists. Triggers re-based onto canonical signals (replacing project:contained-adelaide-2026 / cohort: / engagement:booked tags). Build = Tier 3, gated.
pipeline.name: CONTAINED Adelaide 2026

stages.name: Captured
stages.entry: source:event:contained + place:sa added (Adelaide stop under unified source, RC5)

stages.name: Personal invite
stages.entry: role:funder OR role:media OR VIP segment

suppression_guard._comment: Build FIRST (A8). Safety backstop before any send.
suppression_guard.action: strip from all comms:*; stop other workflows

deal_pipeline._comment: RC6 LOCKED 2026-06-09 (Ben): ONE pipeline for all CONTAINED *deals* (host venue offers, funder $, partner resources), fed by the JusticeHub host/connect routes. Distinct from the participant 'CONTAINED Adelaide 2026' pipeline above (that is the walk-through journey). BOTH GHL_PARTNER_PIPELINE_ID and GHL_FUNDER_PIPELINE_ID point here; the role: tag + opportunity-name prefix ('Host:' / 'Funder:' / 'Partner:') distinguish the deal type. Grants pipeline deliberately NOT reused (that is ACT applying FOR grants, not receiving philanthropy); Empathy Ledger NOT reused (EL-branded, no home for venue hosts). Build = Tier 3, GHL UI, gated to 16 Jun.
deal_pipeline.name: CONTAINED: Partners & Funders

stages.name: New
stages.entry: host/connect form submission (role:partner | role:funder | host offer)

stages.name: Offer / Proposal
stages.entry: venue offered / funding amount or scope proposed

stages.name: Committed
stages.entry: pledged or signed (host $ via Xero ACT-CN)

stages.name: Delivered / Active
stages.entry: venue secured / funds received / partnership live

deal_pipeline.monetary: host pricing ladder $5K-$75K (see cta_map.host_back_tour); funder amounts as pledged. GHL_*_STAGE_NEW = stage 1 'New' id.
deal_pipeline.ocap: A lane:community contact is never moved into a deal pipeline automatically; community partnerships are 1:1, human-led.

lifecycle_layer._comment: RC2 LOCKED 2026-06-09: keep engagement:/campaign-stage: as the campaign lifecycle SEGMENT layer, keyed to CONTAINED by source:event:contained + place:sa (unified source, RC5). No migration of these namespaces for this campaign.

custom_fields._comment: Verified live 2026-06-09 (read-only). Most exist; 2 to create. cohort retained as a FIELD (not a tag) for views; cohort: TAG is dropped (R4).

cohort._comment: mirrors the old cohort:<x> tag for views/reporting; tag itself dropped

slot_confirmed._comment: set when the self-serve calendar booking is confirmed

cta_map._comment: Condensed from the JusticeHub 24-CTA inventory (thoughts/shared/handoffs/contained-cta-ghl-inventory.md). status: canonical | migrate | build | local-only.

register_interest.fix: drop underscore customTags contained/contained_<role>; add source:event:contained + interest:justice-reform

help.note: already emits source:event:contained (no-city, RC5); place from state. No change needed.

host_back_tour.note: HostBackForm at /contained#back-this-tour; host -> role:partner + GHL opportunity gated on GHL_PARTNER_PIPELINE_ID; back -> role:supporter on the backers wall. Pricing ladder $5K-$75K via Xero ACT-CN handled in pipeline.

funder_partner_outreach.note: ConnectForm at /contained/act#connect; funder/partner -> GHL opportunity gated on GHL_FUNDER_PIPELINE_ID / GHL_PARTNER_PIPELINE_ID; enquiry routed to benjamin@act.place (threaded emailFrom).

in_experience_widgets.note: upsert only when name/email attached; no comms:

enroll_device.note: anonymous device session by design; product decision on kiosk opt-in (open, low priority)

preflight._comment: From the campaign-CRM plan P0 evidence. The port's dry-run must reproduce these before any apply.
preflight.conflict_policy: additive-tags-only; if export GHL-ID and email-lookup return different IDs -> mark pending, skip. 9 conflicts are multi-way email dupes (3-5 records each) -> human merge in GHL UI. Kristy Bloomfield = community line.

migration._comment: Off-contract -> canonical rename map for the gated taxonomy migration (Tier 3, day-shift, additive-then-strip, conflict-guarded, re-assert community-line guard after each bucket). Run via scripts/ghl-taxonomy-migrate.mjs --dry-run first. RC3 LOCKED 2026-06-09: STRIP the legacy tag after adding canonical (additive-then-strip).

map.project:contained: project:act-jh + source:event:contained (+ place:<x> derived from state field, RC5)
map.project:contained-adelaide-2026: source:event:contained + place:sa (+ keep project:act-jh) — the 260 Adelaide-cohort contacts (RC5 unified source)
map.cohort:<x>: drop tag; set cohort custom field

tier_discipline: This file is DATA (Tier 1). The dry-run validator (scripts/campaign-preflight.mjs) makes no GHL calls (Tier 1). The preflight module --apply, the tag migration, custom-field/calendar/pipeline creation, automations, and any send are Tier 3, day-shift, human-in-loop, gated to the 16 Jun go/no-go. Never AFK.
